mapper.select: SELECT * FROM batch_task_items WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY item_index
SELECT * FROM batch_task_items WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY item_index
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO batch_task_items ( task_id, item_index, stage, project_id, advertiser_id, item_data, status, retry_count, created_at ) VALUES
(#{item.taskId}, #{item.itemIndex}, #{item.stage}, #{item.projectId}, #{item.advertiserId}, #{item.itemData}, #{item.status}, #{item.retryCount}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE batch_task_items SET status = #{status}, result_id = #{resultId}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, started_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'processing' AND started_at IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE started_at END, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('success', 'failed', 'skipped') THEN NOW() ELSE completed_at END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE batch_task_items SET status = #{newStatus} WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = #{oldStatus}
